select_omit.keyword: GINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY ( START WITH 1
0001" BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY ( START WITH 1

cabeq_branches.rule_hint: Branch when X CABEQ 0, go to EXIT
Branch when X CABEQ 40, go to EXIT
Branch when VYY CABLT 1800, go to EXIT
Branch when VYY CABGT 2100, go to EXIT
Branch when VMM CABLT 01, go to EXIT
Branch when VMM CABGT 12, go to EXIT
Branch when VDD CABLT 01, go to EXIT
Branch when VDD CABGT DYS(VMM), go to EXIT
